summary: Tested all new features for CryptoCoach platform. Fixed critical bug in PricingPage.jsx (tier.price.monthly -> tier.monthlyPrice). All features working: CAPTCHA on register, Coach's Tip on lessons, Certificate Progress bar, Urgency badge, Social proof, Coupon input (CRYPTO15 works), Testimonials, Admin Analytics dashboard with 6 tabs, Discount popup.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - notification count endpoint not found (cosmetic, doesn't affect core functionality)

fixed_bugs.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'monthly')
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed tier.price.monthly to tier.monthlyPrice and tier.price.annual to tier.annualPrice (lines 354-360)

critical_code_review_comments: PricingPage.jsx had inconsistent property access (tier.price.monthly vs tier.monthlyPrice) - FIXED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working. The PricingPage bug was fixed. Discount popup appears after 30 seconds or 50% scroll (stored in localStorage). Valid coupon codes: CRYPTO15 (15%), WELCOME20 (20%), VIP25 (25%). Admin Analytics uses mock data if API not available.

register_page_captcha.details: Math CAPTCHA displays correctly, verify button works, submit disabled until verified

lesson_page_coach_tip.details: Coach's Tip section displays at bottom of lesson with motivational text and CryptoCoach signature

lesson_page_certificate_progress.details: Certificate progress bar displays showing X/23 lessons completed

pricing_page_urgency_badge.details: Countdown timer displays (47h:59m:58s format) with 'Offre expire dans' text

pricing_page_social_proof_mini.details: Shows '127+ étudiants inscrits cette semaine' with avatar icons

pricing_page_coupon_input.details: Toggle expands coupon input, CRYPTO15 code applies 15% discount successfully

pricing_page_testimonials.details: 3 testimonials displayed with ratings, quotes, and author info

pricing_page_social_proof_stats.details: Stats section shows students enrolled, courses completed, online learners, certificates earned

admin_page_analytics_tab.details: Analytics tab exists and displays dashboard with charts, stats, subscription distribution

admin_page_tabs_count.details: 6 tabs present: Dashboard, Analytics, Cours, Utilisateurs, Blog, Média

discount_popup.details: Popup appears after 30 seconds, shows 15% discount offer, email input, stored in localStorage

backend_server.details: Server running without errors, all API endpoints operational
